component.name: util
component.description: Parent pom providing dependency and plugin management for applications built with Maven

components.name: spring-boot-starter
components.description: Core starter, including auto-configuration support, logging and YAML

components.name: spring-boot-starter-logging
components.description: Starter for logging using Logback. Default logging starter

components.name: log4j-to-slf4j
components.description: Forwards the Log4j API calls to SLF4J. (Refer to the `log4j-slf4j[2]-impl` artifacts for forwarding SLF4J to the Log4j API.)

components.name: log4j-api
components.description: The logging API of the Log4j project. Library and application code can log through this API. It contains a simple built-in implementation (`SimpleLogger`) for trivial use cases. Production applications are recommended to use Log4j API in combination with a fully-fledged implementation, such as Log4j Core.

components.name: snakeyaml
components.description: YAML 1.1 parser and emitter for Java

components.name: spring-boot-starter-oauth2-resource-server
components.description: Starter for using Spring Security's OAuth2 resource server features

components.name: nimbus-jose-jwt
components.description: Java library for Javascript Object Signing and Encryption (JOSE) and JSON Web Tokens (JWT)

components.name: jcip-annotations
components.description: A clean room implementation of the JCIP Annotations based entirely on the specification provided by the javadocs.

components.name: ulid-creator
components.description: A Java library for generating ULIDs (Universally Unique Lexicographically Sortable Identifier).

components.name: lombok
components.description: Spice up your java: Automatic Resource Management, automatic generation of getters, setters, equals, hashCode and toString, and more!
